title: Walkthrough: Able Assess Falls Risk Tests

seo.title: Walkthrough: Able Assess Falls Risk Tests | Able Care
seo.description: Watch how Able Assess captures four validated falls risk assessments — grip strength, Timed Up & Go, gait speed and chair stand — in five minutes.

blocks.headline: Able Assess Falls Risk Tests
blocks.subtitle: Four validated falls risk assessments. Five minutes. One workflow.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Able Assess running on a tablet next to the GripAble sensor

blocks.heading: Four key falls risk assessments in five minutes
blocks.body:
We’ve designed the first sensor in the world to measure four key falls risk assessments in five minutes:

  • Single Maximum Grip Strength
  • Timed Up & Go Test
  • Gait Speed
  • Chair Stand Test

This video showcases how to complete all four falls risk assessments in Able Assess:

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.bodyText: A 20-minute demo with a clinician who has run it in the field.
